response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced full-stack engineer with genuine geospatial exposure through GISCollective and Green Map, and has demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby. However, the role's core requirement — production-grade C++ or Rust for routing data pipelines — is not met. C++ appears only in a 2014–2015 role at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, and is absent from his listed skills entirely. There is no Rust experience, no routing tile or navigation pipeline work, and his GIS projects target data collection for NGOs rather than optimized routing infrastructure at scale.
strengths: Geospatial platform development experience via GISCollective and Green Map GIS application
Distributed, high-throughput service engineering at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/second, low-latency async I/O)
Strong quality culture: TDD advocacy, CI/CD, craftsmanship practices across multiple roles
concerns: No practical C++ or Rust expertise; primary commercial stack is TypeScript/Node.js with C++ limited to a 2014–2015 role and thesis project
Zero experience with routing tiles, navigation guidance pipelines, or map data transformation for production environments
GIS work is hobbyist/NGO-scale data collection, not high-reliability routing infrastructure serving global users
